title: Competitive price.
description: The system must be priced competitively, costing less than other touch projectors in the market, and enabling users to run the system with their available hardware (PC-Camera-projector) with no hardware limitations at all.

title: Real-time collaboration.
description: The system must support real-time collaboration by enabling interactions on the projected surface, fostering collaborative environments for business or educational purposes.

title: Low-latency.
description: The system must analyze gestures and reflect the corresponding action on the projected surface in real-time, with minimal latency.
